title: Document Intelligence RAG
summary: Ground answers on internal documents with lightweight retrieval, grounded citations, and fast QA demos.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Document Intelligence RAG is positioned as a Enterprise Knowledge Systems starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Ground answers on internal documents with lightweight retrieval, grounded citations, and fast QA demos.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on rag, search, knowledge.
